title: gouania tiliifolia subsp. tiliifolia
intro: Gouania tiliifolia subsp. tiliifolia, also known as the 'Tiliifolia Gouania', is a shrub-like plant species that belongs to the family Rhamnaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Gouania tiliifolia subsp. tiliifolia include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
